decks.notes: The central idea of this deck is to utilize the powerful recurring spell, Replenish, to bring back enchantments like Opalescence, Parallax Tide, and Parallax Wave from the graveyard to create a devastating combo. By using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search to filter through the deck, alongside disruption tools like Stifle and Swords to Plowshares, the deck aims to control the game before assembling its game-winning combo pieces. Tsabo's Web and Seal of Cleansing provide additional utility and disruption to deal with opponent threats and strategies.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent and control the board with efficient and aggressive creatures and burn spells. By constantly applying pressure with cheap and hasty creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Reckless Charge further enhances the deck's aggressive strategy, while Cursed Scroll provides additional reach and removal.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of Hermit Druid, Phyrexian Devourer, and Triskelion to win the game. It utilizes cards like Survival of the Fittest, Unearth, and Cabal Therapy to search for and protect key combo pieces. The deck also includes reanimation spells like Shallow Grave and Karmic Guide to bring back combo pieces from the graveyard. With a mix of creatures for mana acceleration and disruption, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures.

This deck is focused on playing aggressive creatures and burn spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent. It aims to apply pressure early in the game by playing cheap and efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, then finishing off with direct damage burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. The inclusion of cards like Cursed Scroll and Sulfuric Vortex allows for consistent damage output, while cards like Grim Lavamancer provide additional utility. The deck's mana base is optimized for consistent access to both red mana sources and helps to enable its aggressive game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble an enchantress engine by playing cards like Argothian Enchantress, Enchantress's Presence, and Mirri's Guile to draw cards and generate mana. The deck aims to use this engine to set up a powerful combo with Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and eventually win the game. Other cards like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing provide removal and disruption, while cards like Sterling Grove and Sylvan Library help with card selection and protection. The deck is designed to ramp up quickly and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful enchantment synergy.

The main concept of this Aggro Goblins deck is to quickly flood the board with low-cost creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Goblin Lackey, utilizing cards like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Ringleader to buff and replenish the goblin ranks. Utilizing cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Goblin Sharpshooter to control the board and deal damage, alongside Gempalm Incinerator for removal. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive goblins while also having some utility cards like Naturalize for extra versatility. The land base is focused on ensuring consistent mana production for fast and efficient plays.

This Mono Black Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through hand disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, as well as board control cards like Contamination and Engineered Plague. It also utilizes graveyard recursion with cards like Nether Spirit and Skeletal Scrying to outvalue the opponent in the late game. The deck aims to lock down the opponent's resources and win through attrition, eventually overwhelming them with card advantage and oppressive board control.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo using cards like Stifle and Vision Charm to manipulate the opponent's game plan. With a mix of counter spells and card draw, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up its own win condition. The inclusion of cards like Powder Keg and Mishra's Factory provides additional utility and flexibility in different game situations. Patience and timing are key to executing the combo effectively and outmaneuvering the opponent.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly assemble the Ill-Gotten Gains combo by using cards like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual to generate mana, then casting Ill-Gotten Gains to return key cards from the graveyard while also disrupting the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Mental Note and Opt for card selection and filtering, as well as Cunning Wish to retrieve specific cards from the sideboard. The goal is to efficiently execute the combo and overwhelm the opponent before they can react effectively.

The deck focuses on using counterspells, removal, and card advantage to control the game and prevent the opponent from executing their game plan. It also includes some land disruption cards to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Additionally, it has a win condition in the form of efficient creatures like Phyrexian Dreadnought and manlands like Faerie Conclave and Mishra's Factory. The deck aims to out-value and outmaneuver the opponent through efficient use of resources and controlling the pace of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble a combination of cards that allow the player to generate a large amount of mana and draw through their deck quickly in order to cast a powerful storm spell like Brain Freeze. The deck includes cards like Helm of Awakening and Turnabout to facilitate this mana generation, alongside draw spells like Frantic Search and Opt to help dig through the deck. Cards like Cunning Wish and Ertai's Meddling provide additional options and disruption to help the player achieve their combo.

The deck focuses on using Academy Rector to search for and put into play powerful enchantments like Worship or Pattern of Rebirth, while using creatures like Llanowar Elves and Birds of Paradise to ramp up mana quickly. The deck also utilizes sacrifice outlets like Phyrexian Ghoul and Nantuko Husk to combo with creatures like Symbiotic Wurm or Phantom Nishoba, generating value and advantage through sacrifice. Control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Cabal Therapy help disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Recurring Nightmare provide additional recursion and utility.

The main focus of this RDW deck is to play aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. By using efficient and direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt, Incinerate, and Fireblast, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish the game as quickly as possible. Cards like Grim Lavamancer and Cursed Scroll provide additional reach and control options, while Sulfuric Vortex helps to ensure a swift victory by preventing the opponent from gaining life. The mana base is streamlined to ensure consistent access to the necessary red sources for casting spells.

This deck focuses on aggressively dealing damage to the opponent as quickly as possible using low-cost creatures and burn spells. It aims to overwhelm the opponent by consistently applying pressure and finishing them off with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. It also includes powerful enchantments like Sulfuric Vortex to prevent the opponent from gaining life and maintaining a steady stream of damage. The deck's mana base is designed to ensure a smooth curve and consistent access to the necessary colors for casting spells.

This deck relies on quickly getting out Phyrexian Dreadnought and using Stifle to counter any attempts to destroy it. The goal is to create a powerful combo that can overwhelm the opponent with minimal resources. The deck also includes various counterspells and card draw options to control the game and maintain consistency. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Powder Keg and Parallax Tide offer additional ways to disrupt the opponent's strategy and gain an advantage in the match.

The core strategy of this Mono Red Control deck is to disrupt and slow down the opponent's game plan using a combination of resource denial cards like Winter Orb, Tangle Wire, and Smokestack, along with taxing effects like Sphere of Resistance. This deck aims to control the board through mass removal spells like Pyroclasm and Wildfire, while also utilizing cards like Cursed Scroll and Karn, Silver Golem for additional creature removal and card advantage. With mana acceleration from Thran Dynamo and Fire Diamond, the deck aims to overpower the opponent with threats like Covetous Dragon and efficient beatdown from Goblin Welder.
